CurrentIssues.ID: ComplexCondition:BookToolScreens.kt$path != null && (path.endsWith(".png", true) || path.endsWith(".jpg", true) || path.endsWith(".jpeg", true))

MaxLineLength:BookToolScreens.kt$Icon(if (isPlayerMode) Icons.Rounded.Edit else Icons.Rounded.PlayArrow, stringResource(if (isPlayerMode) R.string.notes_edit_mode else R.string.notes_player_mode))

MaxLineLength:BookToolScreens.kt$LinearProgressIndicator(progress = { if (summary.totalQuestions == 0) 0f else (summary.totalQuestions - summary.unansweredQuestions).toFloat() / summary.totalQuestions }, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth())
MaxLineLength:BookToolScreens.kt$OutlinedTextField(editedBody, { editedBody = it }, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), minLines = 8, label = { Text(stringResource(R.string.notes_article_body)) })

MaxLineLength:BookToolScreens.kt$androidx.compose.material3.Checkbox(checked = isSelected, onCheckedChange = { if (it) selectedItems[itemId] = previewText to null else selectedItems.remove(itemId) })

MaxLineLength:BookToolScreens.kt$androidx.compose.material3.Checkbox(checked = isSelected, onCheckedChange = { if (it) selectedItems[itemId] = previewText to source else selectedItems.remove(itemId) })
MaxLineLength:BookToolScreens.kt$confirmButton = { Button(onClick = { onConfirm(sourceTitle, sourceType, details, url) }, enabled = sourceTitle.isNotBlank()) { Text(confirmLabel) } }
MaxLineLength:BookToolScreens.kt$confirmButton = { Button(onClick = { onConfirm(title, prompt, type) }, enabled = title.isNotBlank() && prompt.isNotBlank()) { Text("Save") } }

MaxLineLength:BookToolScreens.kt$item { FilterChip(selected = includeOptions, onClick = { includeOptions = !includeOptions }, label = { Text(stringResource(R.string.prompt_part_options)) }) }
MaxLineLength:BookToolScreens.kt$item { FilterChip(selected = includeStem, onClick = { includeStem = !includeStem }, label = { Text(stringResource(R.string.prompt_part_stem)) }) }
MaxLineLength:BookToolScreens.kt$onCreate = { title, body, mode -> viewModel.updateNote(note.copy(title = title, body = body, blueprintMode = mode)); editingState.value = null }

MaxLineLength:BookToolScreens.kt$prompt = "<system_role>You are a highly organized academic advisor.</system_role>
<instructions>Based on the following material, create a structured, step-by-step study schedule. Break down the topics into manageable daily or weekly tasks.</instructions>
<material>
{material}
</material>"

MaxLineLength:BookToolScreens.kt$prompt = "<system_role>You are an expert learning designer.</system_role>
<instructions>Create high-yield flashcards.
Output JSON array with keys: "front", "back", "hint".</instructions>
<material>
{material}
</material>"

MaxLineLength:BookToolScreens.kt$prompt = "<system_role>You are an expert memory coach and educator.</system_role>
<instructions>Create catchy, easy-to-remember mnemonics (like acronyms or rhymes) to help memorize the key facts from this material.</instructions>
<material>
{material}
</material>"

MaxLineLength:BookToolScreens.kt$prompt = "<system_role>You are an expert summarizer.</system_role>
<instructions>Provide a concise summary of the following material. Highlight the key takeaways and main concepts.</instructions>
<material>
{material}
</material>"

MaxLineLength:BookToolScreens.kt$prompt = "<system_role>You are an expert teacher who excels at explaining complex topics simply.</system_role>
<instructions>Explain the core concepts of the provided material as if you were speaking to a 5-year-old. Use simple analogies and avoid jargon.</instructions>
<material>
{material}
</material>"

MaxLineLength:BookToolScreens.kt$prompt = "<system_role>You are an expert test creator.</system_role>
<instructions>Generate multiple-choice questions from this material.
Output JSON array with keys: "question", "options", "answer", "explanation".</instructions>
<material>
{material}
</material>"

MaxLineLength:BookToolScreens.kt$prompt = "<system_role>You are an expert tutor in {relevant_speciality}.</system_role>
<instructions>Please explain the following question part: {part_to_explain}.

Here is the full question context:
{question}</instructions>"
MaxLineLength:BookToolScreens.kt$val explainCard = state.promptCards.find { it.title.contains("Explain", ignoreCase = true) || it.title.contains("Ask AI", ignoreCase = true) }
MaxLineLength:BookToolScreens.kt$val filteredQuestions = if (selectedQuizId == null) state.questions else state.questions.filter { it.quizId == selectedQuizId }
MaxLineLength:BookToolScreens.kt$val imageAssets = assets.filter { it.assetType == "image" || it.mimeType?.startsWith("image/") == true }.mapNotNull { it.localPath }
MaxLineLength:BookToolScreens.kt$val partName = variables.firstOrNull { it.contains("part_to_explain", ignoreCase = true) || it.contains("part", ignoreCase = true) }

MaxLineLength:BookToolScreens.kt$val varName = variables.firstOrNull { it.contains("question", ignoreCase = true) || it.contains("content", ignoreCase = true) || it.contains("text", ignoreCase = true) }

MaxLineLength:BookToolsViewModel.kt$BookToolsViewModel$"BLUEPRINT" -> "<system_role>You are an expert technical writer and educator.</system_role>
<instructions>Synthesize the provided material into a highly structured, comprehensive, yet easy-to-digest study blueprint.
Format the output in Markdown with the following sections:
- **Core Summary**: A brief 2-3 sentence overview.
- **Key Concepts**: Bulleted list of the most important takeaways.
- **Detailed Breakdown**: A structured analysis with subheadings.
- **Common Pitfalls / Mistakes to Avoid**: What students usually get wrong about this.
- **Review Cues**: Short questions to test memory.</instructions>
<material>
{material}
</material>"

MaxLineLength:BookToolsViewModel.kt$BookToolsViewModel$"EXPLAIN" -> "<system_role>You are an expert tutor in {relevant_speciality}.</system_role>
<instructions>Please explain the following question part: {part_to_explain}.

Here is the full question context:
{question}</instructions>"

MaxLineLength:BookToolsViewModel.kt$BookToolsViewModel$"FLASHCARDS" -> "<system_role>You are an expert learning designer.</system_role>
<instructions>Convert the core concepts from the provided material into concise, high-yield spaced-repetition flashcards.
Follow these rules:
1. Make the front of the card a clear, unambiguous question or cloze deletion.
2. Keep the back of the card concise and to the point.
3. Provide an optional brief hint to aid recall.
Output strictly in JSON format as an array of objects with keys: "front", "back", "hint".</instructions>
<material>
{material}
</material>"

MaxLineLength:BookToolsViewModel.kt$BookToolsViewModel$"QUIZ" -> "<system_role>You are an expert test creator and medical educator.</system_role>
<instructions>Analyze the provided material and generate 3 to 5 high-quality, challenging multiple-choice questions.
Ensure that:
1. The stem is clinically relevant or focuses on key conceptual understanding.
2. There are 4-5 plausible options.
3. The correct answer is unambiguously correct.
4. A detailed rationale/explanation is provided for why the correct answer is right and why the distractors are wrong.
Output strictly in JSON format as an array of objects with keys: "question", "options" (array of strings), "answer" (string), "explanation" (string).</instructions>
<material>
{material}
</material>"

MaxLineLength:BookToolsViewModel.kt$BookToolsViewModel$allNotes = saved?.let { (_uiState.value.allNotes.filter { note -> note.id != id } + it).sortedByDescending { note -> note.updatedAt } } ?: _uiState.value.allNotes

MaxLineLength:BookToolsViewModel.kt$BookToolsViewModel$allPromptDecks = saved?.let { (_uiState.value.allPromptDecks.filter { deck -> deck.id != id } + it).sortedByDescending { deck -> deck.updatedAt } } ?: _uiState.value.allPromptDecks

MaxLineLength:BookToolsViewModel.kt$BookToolsViewModel$val systemPrompt = "You are an expert educational AI assistant inside the MKS knowledge-bank app. Generate high-quality, structured output exactly as requested by the user's prompt. Do NOT include conversational filler, greetings, or explanations unless explicitly requested."
MaxLineLength:CategoryQuestionsScreen.kt$onAddAnnotation = { selectedText, noteBody, colorLabel -> viewModel.addQuestionAnnotation(bookId, question.id, selectedText, noteBody, colorLabel) }

MaxLineLength:CategoryQuestionsViewModel.kt$CategoryQuestionsViewModel$knowledgeRepository.createFlashcardDeckFromQuestions(sourceQuiz.bookId, title, "Generated from selected questions", selected, clearMarksAfter)
MaxLineLength:CompilerDialog.kt$color = if (isCorrect) Color(0xFF4CAF50) else if (question.isIncluded) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
MaxLineLength:CompilerViewModel.kt$CompilerViewModel$_uiState.update { it.copy(isLoading = true, error = null, questions = emptyList(), targetQuizId = targetQuizId, targetDeckId = targetDeckId) }
MaxLineLength:DataToolsScreen.kt$Text("Danger Zone", style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleSmall, fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error)
MaxLineLength:DataToolsScreen.kt$Text("Data Integrity", style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium, fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium, modifier = Modifier.padding(top = 8.dp))
MaxLineLength:DataToolsScreen.kt$Text("Restore", style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium, fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium, modifier = Modifier.padding(top = 8.dp))
MaxLineLength:DataToolsViewModel.kt$DataToolsViewModel$_state.update { it.copy(isWorking = false, showResetConfirm = false, message = "Database reset complete. Sample data reloaded.") }
MaxLineLength:FlashcardDeckScreen.kt$DropdownMenuItem(text = { Text("All Book Questions") }, onClick = { source = "ALL"; sourceId = null; expandedSource = false })
MaxLineLength:FlashcardDeckScreen.kt$DropdownMenuItem(text = { Text("Category") }, onClick = { source = "CATEGORY"; sourceId = categories.firstOrNull(); expandedSource = false })
MaxLineLength:FlashcardDeckScreen.kt$DropdownMenuItem(text = { Text("Marked Questions") }, onClick = { source = "MARKED"; sourceId = null; expandedSource = false })
MaxLineLength:FlashcardDeckScreen.kt$DropdownMenuItem(text = { Text("Missed Questions") }, onClick = { source = "MISSED"; sourceId = null; expandedSource = false })
MaxLineLength:FlashcardDeckScreen.kt$DropdownMenuItem(text = { Text("Specific Quiz") }, onClick = { source = "QUIZ"; sourceId = quizzes.firstOrNull()?.id?.toString(); expandedSource = false })
MaxLineLength:FlashcardDeckScreen.kt$DropdownMenuItem(text = { Text(quiz.title) }, onClick = { sourceId = quiz.id.toString(); expandedSubSource = false })
MaxLineLength:FlashcardDeckScreen.kt$Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) { Checkbox(includeAdditionalInfoInBack, { includeAdditionalInfoInBack = it }); Text("Additional Info") }
MaxLineLength:FlashcardDeckScreen.kt$Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) { Checkbox(includeStemInFront, { includeStemInFront = it }); Text("Question Stem") }

MaxLineLength:GlobalSearchScreen.kt$EmptyStateCard("Search MKS", "Type at least two characters to search across books, quizzes, questions, assets, sources, flashcards, blueprints, prompts, and mistakes.")
MaxLineLength:LibraryComponents.kt$drawLine(colors.primary.copy(alpha = 0.36f), Offset(w * 0.18f, y), Offset(w * (0.27f - i * 0.01f), y - h * 0.035f), 2.dp.toPx())
MaxLineLength:LibraryComponents.kt$drawLine(colors.primary.copy(alpha = 0.44f), Offset(w * 0.18f, y), Offset(w * (0.10f + i * 0.01f), y - h * 0.035f), 2.dp.toPx())
MaxLineLength:LibraryDialogs.kt$onConfirm: (title: String, description: String, coverImage: String?, sourceQuizIds: List<Long>, sourceCategories: List<String>, filters: QuizCreationFilters) -> Unit
MaxLineLength:LibraryDialogs.kt$selectedCategories = if (selectedCategories.contains(cat)) selectedCategories - cat else selectedCategories + cat
MaxLineLength:LibraryDialogs.kt$selectedQuizIds = if (selectedQuizIds.contains(quiz.id)) selectedQuizIds - quiz.id else selectedQuizIds + quiz.id
MaxLineLength:ProviderConfigDialog.kt$Text("Setup complete! Tap Save to finish.", style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary)
MaxLineLength:ProviderConfigDialog.kt$Text("Tap Save to apply these settings.", style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary)
MaxLineLength:QuestionAssetsDialog.kt$Text("Add an image, PDF, text note, web link, or source citation to make this question a richer study workspace.")
MaxLineLength:QuestionAssetsDialog.kt$Text("Annotations", style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleSmall, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, modifier = Modifier.weight(1f))
MaxLineLength:QuizPlayerScreen.kt$Icon(Icons.Rounded.Check, contentDescription = null, modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp), tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary)
MaxLineLength:QuizPlayerScreen.kt$Icon(Icons.Rounded.HourglassBottom, contentDescription = "Quiz Timer", modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp), tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary)
MaxLineLength:QuizPlayerScreen.kt$Icon(Icons.Rounded.Update, contentDescription = "Question Timer", modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp), tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondary)
MaxLineLength:QuizPlayerScreen.kt$color = if (accuracy >= 80) Color(0xFF4CAF50) else if (accuracy >= 50) Color(0xFFFF9800) else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error

MaxLineLength:QuizPlayerScreen.kt$text = if (state.isAnswered) stringResource(R.string.next) else if (state.isOneByOne && state.visibleOptionsCount < state.shuffledOptions.size) stringResource(R.string.reveal) else stringResource(R.string.submit)
MaxLineLength:QuizQuestionsScreen.kt$onAddAnnotation = { selectedText, noteBody, colorLabel -> viewModel.addQuestionAnnotation(bookId, question.id, selectedText, noteBody, colorLabel) }

MaxLineLength:QuizQuestionsViewModel.kt$QuizQuestionsViewModel$(query.isBlank() || question.text.contains(query, ignoreCase = true) || question.explanation?.contains(query, ignoreCase = true) == true)
MaxLineLength:QuizQuestionsViewModel.kt$QuizQuestionsViewModel$knowledgeRepository.createFlashcardDeckFromQuestions(quiz.bookId, title, "Generated from selected questions", selected, clearMarksAfter)
MaxLineLength:QuizViewModel.kt$QuizViewModel$_uiState.update { it.copy(isLoading = false, error = "Current question data is missing. This session may be corrupted.") }
MaxLineLength:QuizViewModel.kt$QuizViewModel$val newIncorrectCount = if (!isCorrect && isFirstAttempt) currentSession.incorrectCount + 1 else currentSession.incorrectCount
MaxLineLength:ScannerScreen.kt$Icon(Icons.Default.Delete, contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.delete), modifier = Modifier.size(20.dp), tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error)
MaxLineLength:ScannerScreen.kt$Icon(Icons.Default.ErrorOutline, contentDescription = null, modifier = Modifier.size(64.dp), tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error)

MaxLineLength:SessionManagementScreen.kt$var questionTimerSeconds by rememberSaveable { mutableStateOf(if (defaultQuestionTimerSeconds > 0) defaultQuestionTimerSeconds.toString() else "30") }

MaxLineLength:SlideshowCourseScreen.kt$OutlinedTextField(notes, { notes = it }, label = { Text(stringResource(R.string.slide_notes)) }, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(), minLines = 2)
MaxLineLength:SummaryScreen.kt$color = if (MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer == Color(0xFFFFB300)) Color.Black else Color(0xFFFF9800)
MaxLineLength:SummaryScreen.kt$tint = if (MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer == Color(0xFFFFB300)) Color.Black else Color(0xFFFF9800)
MaxLineLength:TrashBinDialog.kt$Text("Are you sure you want to permanently delete \"$title\"? This action is irreversible and all nested files or assets will be lost.")

MaxLineLength:WorkspaceManagerDialog.kt$Text("Are you sure you want to delete workspace \"${workspace.name}\"? All books and content inside this workspace will be soft-deleted and moved to the Trash Bin.")
